text:
Peijin (ペイジン, Peijin; also Peijing in the anime) Eventually, in Chapter 304, "Peijing" was also used in the Viz translation of the manga. is the capital city of the Republic of East Gorteau, located on the Southeastern end of the country. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 224 Ming Jol-ik, Supreme Leader of the country, lives in a palace just outside of the city. After the Chimera Ants covertly seize power of the country, Neferpitou manipulates Ming Jol-ik's body to have the nation's citizens all assemble in Peijin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 223 

The hideout used by the Hunters of the Extermination Team to keep Kite Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 222 is located somewhere in Peijin, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 29, Chapter 304 specifically in a forested area. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 29, Chapter 303 

Trivia

Its name seems to be a portmanteau of Beijing and Peking, which is an alternate romanization to Beijing.
The [Hunter] hideout, where Kite's body was kept, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 29, Chapter 307 is based on the real-life Neuschwanstein Castle—a famous 19th-century palace in southwest Bavaria, Germany, popular as tourist destination.
